name: Valid Email/Password Login
expected: Dashboard screen is displayed with crops grid

name: Invalid Email Format
expected: Error message 'Invalid email address' is displayed

name: Blank Password Validation
expected: Error message 'Password cannot be empty' is displayed

name: Blank Email Validation
expected: Error message 'Email cannot be empty' is displayed

name: Incorrect Password Attempt
expected: Error message 'Invalid email or password' is displayed

name: Account Lockout Threshold
steps: Enter wrong password 5 times in a row
expected: Account is temporarily locked for 15 minutes

name: Biometrics Toggle Settings
preconditions: User is logged in on profile settings
steps: Toggle biometric authentication switch to ON
expected: Biometric enrollment prompt appears

name: Session Persistence on App Kill
steps: Close and kill app from background
expected: Dashboard is displayed without asking for credentials

name: Logout Redirection & Token Cleared
expected: Login screen is displayed and session token is destroyed

name: Password Field Toggle Visibility
steps: Click Eye icon on password field
expected: Password text is visible in plaintext

name: Access Restricted Feature Without Permission
preconditions: User logged in with guest role
steps: Navigate to Admin Dashboard direct URL
expected: Access Denied screen is displayed

name: Tenant Data Separation Verification
steps: Request details of Crop ID belonging to Tenant B
expected: Error 403 Forbidden is returned

name: Read-Only Permission Enforcement
steps: Attempt to edit crop name field
expected: Edit fields are disabled or read-only

name: Admin Dashboard Visibility
preconditions: User logged in as standard user
steps: Look at bottom navigation menu and drawer
expected: Admin dashboard option is not visible in menus

name: Token Tampering Rejection
preconditions: User is logged in with valid token
steps: Intercept request and modify user_id in JWT payload
expected: Server rejects the request with HTTP 401 Unauthorized

name: Role Escalation Attempt
steps: Submit registration form with 'role' field set to 'admin'
expected: Server overrides role to 'farmer' and ignores admin flag

steps: Click cancel button or back button
expected: Confirmation dialog 'Discard unsaved changes?' is displayed

preconditions: User is filling crop diagnosis form
expected: Form fields are prepopulated with previously typed text

name: Mandi price non-numeric check

expected: Field blocks alphabets or shows error 'Must be a numeric value'

name: Email field structure checks
expected: Validation error 'Enter a valid email address' appears

name: Phone number character bounds validation
expected: Input truncated or error 'Max 10 digits allowed' shown

name: SQL Injection characters escape check
expected: No database error thrown, characters sanitized/escaped cleanly

name: XSS HTML injection prevention
expected: Text displayed as string, no script execution occurs

name: Access Token Silent Refresh
preconditions: User has been active for 1 hour
expected: Client refreshes token silently in background and request completes

name: Token Expiration forced redirect
steps: Wake up app from deep standby
expected: User is automatically logged out and redirected to login screen

name: Sign out on device clear data
preconditions: User clears app cache from system settings
expected: User is prompted to login, cached tokens are gone

name: Concurrent login alerts
preconditions: User logged in on Device A
steps: Log in with same credentials on Device B
expected: Device A is signed out and redirected with session expired notice

name: App Startup cold boot limit
steps: Measure duration from launcher click to dashboard
expected: App dashboard loads and renders interactive elements in under 3.0s

name: Memory leaks scroll profile list
steps: Scroll crop list up and down for 50 iterations
expected: Heap allocation stays stable, no out of memory crash occurs

name: CPU load threshold chat advisory
expected: CPU utilization spikes stay below 45% standard limit
